headline: Ford (F) Stock After 37% Year Return Is There Still Upside Potential
summary: If you have been wondering whether Ford Motor stock still offers value at around US$14.13, you are not alone. Many investors are asking the same question. The stock is up 0.5% over the last week and 5.9% year to date, but is down 11.0% over the past month, with a 37.3% return over the last year adding to the debate about its risk and reward trade off. Recent coverage has focused on how Ford Motor is positioning its business in key areas such as electric vehicles, software and recurring...

headline: Does Ford’s LFP EV Push and Quality Win Reshape the Bull Case For Ford Motor (F)?
summary: Ford Motor recently reached a major production milestone at its Michigan battery plant and confirmed it remains on track to ship lower-cost lithium-iron phosphate batteries and launch a roughly US$30,000 electric pickup in 2026, while also earning top mainstream brand status in the 2026 J.D. Power U.S. Initial Quality Study with multiple segment wins. This combination of improved initial quality and progress on more affordable EV technology highlights how Ford is trying to enhance both...
